author: vadim borisov (tabularis.ai)
name: Int6 MLP3x + Tuned LR + SmearGate + SlidingWindow
blurb: Four stacked improvements over baseline: (1) int6 per-row quantization on MLP+attention matrices with zstd-22 compression and fp16 tied embedding passthrough, enabling (2) 3x MLP expansion (hidden=1536). (3) Tuned optimizer: halved LRs (matrix_lr=0.02, scalar_lr=0.02, tied_embed_lr=0.03), higher Muon momentum (0.99 with warmup from 0.92 over 1500 steps), extended warmdown (3000 iters), gradient clipping (1.0). (4) SmearGate blending adjacent token embeddings. Sliding window eval with stride=64.
